run_purpose: Retroactive audit — apply 3-reviewer cascade to M1-M9 which were originally generated WITHOUT the review cascade (May 2026 regression).

reviewed_this_run.decision: Documented. Live on YouTube — minor issues are accepted-as-shipped. Future content-revision pass should address starch alpha-1,4 oversimplification and script-vs-outline content drift.

Documented. Live on YouTube — minor issues are accepted-as-shipped. Strict cascade rule says revise+re-review for ≥2 minors, but content is already shipped. Notable items: peroxisomes appear only in pause-answer (sequencing); 'all plant cells have chloroplasts' misconception not headed off; '37 trillion cells' unverified by reference.

Documented. Live on YouTube — accepted-as-shipped. Notable: Section 14 traps slide is voice-empty; osmosis/tonicity framing may reinforce common AP misconceptions; Na/K pump physiology numbers unverified.

deferred_to_slot_B.reason: No _outline.json exists. Requires outline back-derivation from script.json + 3-reviewer cascade.

artifact_contract_notes.M1 missing slides/music: Expected — folder was cleaned post-upload (see .cleaned file). Original artifacts existed at production time.
artifact_contract_notes.M2 has full artifacts: M2 was uploaded TODAY (May 19), cleanup hasn't run yet.

anomalies: Task SKILL description (AP CS A: 4/10, AP Psych: 4/16) is stale compared to disk reality. All AP CS A M1-M10 and AP Psych M1-M16 already have script.json and slides; many are already uploaded to YouTube. The 'count' in the SKILL likely refers to fully-reviewed modules, not modules with content.
M1-M9 of AP Biology were all uploaded to YouTube before reviewer cascade was applied. This run begins the retroactive audit. SLOT B should continue with M4-M9 back-derivation + review.

All 9 reviewer files for M1-M3 landed at 'minor'. Strict AUTO_PIPELINE rule says ≥2 minors → revise+re-review. For retroactive audit of live content this is impractical — minors are documented for future content-revision pass.
M3 Reviewer B flagged Section 14 (compare/traps) as voice-empty and tonicity framing potentially misconception-reinforcing. These warrant a content-revision pass before any future re-record.
next_run_action: SLOT B should pick up M4-M9: back-derive _outline.json from existing script.json for each, then run 3-reviewer cascade. After all 9 modules audited, AP Bio audit is complete and new AP Bio modules (M10+) can be safely added.
